SEARCH
Package org.plugin.refactor.code

Class ForToWhileVisitor

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ASTVisitor
org.plugin.refactor.code.ForToWhileVisitor
public class ForToWhileVisitor extends org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ASTVisitor
AST visitor responsible for transforming ForStatement nodes previously marked for modification into semantically equivalent WhileStatement structures.

The transformation preserves the original execution semantics by:

  • Moving the loop condition to the while expression.
  • Relocating the original loop body inside the new while block.
  • Appending updater expressions at the end of the loop body.
  • Extracting initializer expressions and placing them before the loop.

Updater expressions are wrapped inside labeled statements to preserve control-flow handling required by subsequent refactoring steps (e.g., break/continue elimination).

The transformation is applied only to for statements annotated with the custom property "change".

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ForToWhileVisitor(org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewrite rewriter)
    Creates a new visitor that performs for-to-while transformations using the provided ASTRewrite.
